operating_ranges.evidence: collects used coffee grounds with 400g capacity

degradation_mechanisms.evidence: Once the grounds drawer is full with coffee cakes, empty it

fault_conditions.name: drawer_full
fault_conditions.description: grounds drawer is full with coffee cakes
fault_conditions.evidence: Once the grounds drawer is full with coffee cakes, empty it according to the following steps and the instructions displayed

maintenance_actions.name: empty_and_clean_grounds_drawer
maintenance_actions.evidence: Remove the grounds drawer (1). Empty the grounds drawer, clean and dry it. Replace the grounds drawer (1)

maintenance_actions.name: cleaning_procedure_grounds_drawer
maintenance_actions.evidence: Empty the grounds drawer in a sink and clean it with soft soap. Rinse and dry the grounds drawer

assumptions.statement: Grounds drawer may contain hot water after cleaning cycles
assumptions.reason: Manual states 'After first startup or during cleaning, the grounds drawer may contain hot water, empty it carefully'
Manual states 'Coffee grounds may be composted or recycled with organic waste'
